theme.title: 02 Numbers, Time, and Dates
theme.description: Practice numbers, dates, time expressions, and hay for basic descriptions.

lesson.title: Day 4: Telling Time and Hay
lesson.instructions: Tell the time and describe what there is in a place.

exercises.explanation: Use son las for other hours.

exercises.answer: La clase es a las ocho.

exercises.prompt: Hay un libro en la mesa.
exercises.answer: There is a book on the table.
exercises.explanation: En means on or in depending on context.

exercises.prompt: Hay dos sillas en la cocina.
exercises.answer: There are two chairs in the kitchen.
exercises.explanation: Hay also works for plural nouns.

exercises.prompt: There is a park in my city.
exercises.answer: Hay un parque en mi ciudad.
exercises.explanation: A simple hay sentence with place vocabulary.
